rag_rules: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks within component type or implementation scopes.
Assumptions referring to component ports must be placed in valid component type scopes.
generic_rules: Use explicit type alignment in AGREE declarations to match AADL data types.
Avoid encoding AADL properties as AGREE variables unless typed ports or constants are explicitly exposed.
Boolean expressions in AGREE should only reference AGREE bool types in scope.
Range comparisons in AGREE should use appropriate data types (bool, int, real) matching the expression context.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE equation declarations must use valid variable names and types from the AADL model.
Component-level assumptions and guarantees should be placed in component type annexes unless binding to implementation details.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL property names like Compute_Execution_Time or unit tokens (ms, Hz) as AGREE variables.
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers in AGREE expressions without explicit scalar representation.
